expires_today.title: Ultimate AI Skills Bundle
expires_today.long_description: Don’t let the AI revolution pass you by—pay what you want for the Ultimate AI Skills Bundle and begin your learning journey today. Explore the ins and outs of ChatGPT with ChatGPT Course: Master AI for Work & Creativity, start selling your own AI imagery with Midjourney Course: Create & Monetize AI Art, master Adobe’s flagship AI tools with Adobe Firefly Course: AI-Powered Design, Illustration & Photography Tools, and more! Get the advice and knowledge you seek from expert-led courses, and help support Save the Children with your purchase!

expires_today.title: Warhammer Skulls 2026 Bundle
expires_today.description: Celebrate ten years of Warhammer Skulls
expires_today.long_description:
If you’re one of the lucky Space Marines gearing up for this year’s Warhammer Skulls festival—the tenth annual celebration!—we have a real treat for you. Build out your Warhammer 40,000 library with a bundle of strategy, shooter, and RPG games that will make the 41st millennium feel closer than ever! Build up your army and evolve your weapons arsenal in Warhammer 40,000: Battlesector! Brave the hordes of the Caligari Sector and carry out the Emperor’s will in Warhammer 40,000: Inquisitor - Martyr! Join the Ork forces and master the skies in Warhammer 40,000: Dakka Squadron - Flyboyz Edition! There’s even more fun to be had in this seven-game bundle, so grab it now before your enemies can take it, and support Comic Relief with your purchase at the price of your choosing!

Keys expire. Please redeem your keys before Jun 5th, 2027.

expires_tomorrow.title: 4X: Xplore, Xpand, Xploit, Xterminate
expires_tomorrow.description: Your rise to greatness will be documented
expires_tomorrow.long_description:
Explore dynamic maps, expand your territory, exploit the environment for resources, and exterminate anything that interferes with a massive collection of 4X games! Lead armies and rise to greatness in Songs of Silence, a visually stunning adventure filled with intense battles and captivating stories, build an unrivaled empire and flex your galactic greatness in pure 64-bit awesomeness with Distant Worlds 2, and more! Pay what you want for epic 4X fun and help support Direct Relief with your purchase!

Keys Expire. Please redeem before June 12th, 2027.

expires_tomorrow.title: Infinite Dread: Horror Comics by Oni Press
expires_tomorrow.long_description: Superheroes are all well and good, but oftentimes horror is where comics really shine. To bring you the spookiest stories the medium has to offer, we’ve teamed up with Oni Press for a selection of comics that are sure to keep you up at night! Something horrifically weird is going on and no one will talk about it in Hobtown Mystery Stories. A startling new experiment in comic book storytelling inspired by firsthand accounts of real paranormal encounters awaits in High Strangeness. And you're only alive if you're online in Cemetery Kids Don't Die. There’s even more to explore in this ghoulish library of haunts, so grab it now at the price of your choosing, and support BINC with your purchase!

expires_tomorrow.title: The Claude Code Mastery Bundle by Zenva
expires_tomorrow.long_description: Develop software faster and learn the AI workflows modern developers are rapidly adopting with The Claude Code Mastery Bundle. Build full-stack AI apps with Next.js and Python, integrate Stripe subscriptions and modern LLM APIs, automate workflows with MCP and GitHub, and learn how to run fully private local AI systems with Ollama and OpenCode—all in one amazing bundle! Pay what you want for a masterclass collection from Zenva and support Alzheimer’s Research UK while building skills that can immediately improve how you develop software.

expires_within_72h.title: Spring Into Creativity
expires_within_72h.long_description: Unlock four elite editing software programs for one low price with the all-new Spring Into Creativity Bundle. Make every shot your best with the advanced photo editing tools in PaintShop Pro 2023. Save hours of time spent editing at your computer with the efficient AI-based solutions of AfterShot Pro 2023. Turn your best moments into unique movies with the easy-to-use editing software VideoStudio Pro. Create your own AI talking photos with PhotoMirage. Pay what you want for a comprehensive creative library and help support Extra Life with your purchase.
